name: Modmail Logviewer
description: A simple webserver to view Modmail logs.

CONNECTION_URI.description: MongoDB connection URI that contains your Modmail logs.

BASE_URL.description: Optional base path when the app is mounted behind a reverse proxy path, for example /creators or /regional.

LOG_URL_PREFIX.description: Path below BASE_URL where logs are served.

USE_ATTACHMENT_PROXY.description: Whether if the logviewer should use a proxy to view attachments. If set to 'no', attachments will expire after 1 day. USE AT YOUR OWN RISK.
